Analysis Cercospora TIME

Author

Anderson Cerutti

Data and packages

Packages

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(emmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(car)
library(performance)
library(patchwork)
library(sjPlot)
library(flextable)
library(multcomp)
library(multcompView)
library(GGally)
library(plotly)
library(corrplot)
library(lmerTest)

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("lmer", "lme4")

Data

IPM_desc

TIME_data <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/Cercospora_TIME_measure.xlsx","TIME")
TIME_desc <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/Cercospora_TIME_description.xlsx","TIME")
TIME_data_disease <-  TIME_data
TIME_data_yield   <-  TIME_desc
  
n_lesion_plot <- TIME_data_disease %>%
  filter(lesion_n > 0) %>%
  group_by(year, trial_ID, plot) %>%
  summarise(
    CPB = mean(CPB, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_lesion = n(),
    .groups = "drop",
    inc  = (n_lesion * 100)/50)

TIME_yield_data <- TIME_data_yield %>% 
  mutate(
     yld = weight_12/(80/43560), 
     kg_ha = yld*1.2085) %>% 
  dplyr::select(year, trial_ID, trial, env, field, plot, blk, trt, 
                  gen,fung, fung_time, total, head, yld, kg_ha, NBLS)

CERC_TIME_data <- right_join(TIME_yield_data, n_lesion_plot,
                  by = c("year","trial_ID","plot")) %>%
                  filter(!field %in% c("WIN")) %>%
                  filter(!fung %in% c("Tilt+A.Top")) %>%
  mutate(
    pressure = ifelse(inc > median(inc), "high", "low")) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(trial))

#CERC_TIME_data %>%
  #group_by(fung, year) %>% 
  #summarise(n=n())

Descriptive

CERC_TIME_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(gen), !is.na(fung_time)) %>%
  mutate(
    gen = fct_reorder(gen, kg_ha, .fun = mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    fung_time = factor(fung_time)
  ) %>%
   #filter(year==2025) %>% 
  
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fung, y = kg_ha)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = fung_time), size = 2, width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 18,     
    size = 4,
    color = "black",
    fill = "yellow",
    stroke = 1
  ) +
  
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  facet_grid(trial~year)
CERC_TIME_data %>% 
  filter(!is.na(gen)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(fung_time)) %>%
  
ggplot( aes(x = gen, y = kg_ha, color = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60)) +
  facet_wrap(~year + env, ncol=4)
CERC_TIME_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(CPB)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gen)) %>% 
ggplot( aes(x = gen, y = CPB, color = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  labs(title = "CPB por genótipo e fung_time")
CERC_TIME_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(CPB)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fung_time)) %>%
ggplot( aes(x = fung_time, y = CPB, fill = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~env) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "CPB por fung_time facetado por ambiente")
CERC_TIME_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(fung_time)) %>%
ggplot( aes(x = fung_time, y = kg_ha, fill = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(year ~ env) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90)) +
  labs(title = "Produtividade por fung_time (facetado por ano e ambiente)")
CERC_TIME_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(n_lesion)) %>%
ggplot( aes(x = fung_time, y = n_lesion, fill = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~year) +
  theme_bw()
CERC_TIME_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(fung_time)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(n_lesion)) %>%
ggplot( aes(x = fung_time, y = n_lesion, fill = fung_time)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~env, ncol=4) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

Fitting

Productivity

Field

CERC_TIME_data %>%   
  filter(trial_ID != "25-CER_TIME2") %>% 
  filter(year != 2024) %>% 
  filter(!c(field=="RRS3"&plot==201 & year==2025))
YLD_prod <- lmer(kg_ha ~ fung  + ( 1 | year / env ), data=CERC_TIME_data, REML=T)

AIC(YLD_prod)
[1] 4906.786
BIC(YLD_prod)
[1] 4933.077
anova(YLD_prod)
summary(YLD_prod)
Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
Formula: kg_ha ~ fung + (1 | year/env)
   Data: CERC_TIME_data

REML criterion at convergence: 4892.8

Scaled residuals: 
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-5.1177 -0.5405  0.1161  0.6235  1.9442 

Random effects:
 Groups   Name        Variance  Std.Dev. 
 env:year (Intercept) 2.913e+06 1.707e+03
 year     (Intercept) 3.391e-04 1.841e-02
 Residual             3.204e+05 5.660e+02
Number of obs: 316, groups:  env:year, 7; year, 2

Fixed effects:
            Estimate Std. Error t value
(Intercept)  6421.77     651.39   9.859
fungCevya     319.67     112.99   2.829
fungProt      -10.57     113.24  -0.093
fungTilt       94.08     103.04   0.913

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
          (Intr) fngCvy fngPrt
fungCevya -0.102              
fungProt  -0.102  0.650       
fungTilt  -0.122  0.639  0.637
optimizer (nloptwrap) convergence code: 0 (OK)
boundary (singular) fit: see help('isSingular')
emmeans::emm_options(lmer.df = "satterthwaite")
YLD_emm <- emmeans(YLD_prod, ~ fung)
print(cld(YLD_emm, alpha = 0.05, Letters = letters))
 fung   emmean  SE   df lower.CL upper.CL .group
 Prot     6411 650 6.15     4831     7992  a    
 _CHECK   6422 651 6.21     4841     8003  a    
 Tilt     6516 647 6.05     4936     8096  ab   
 Cevya    6741 650 6.15     5161     8322   b   

Degrees-of-freedom method: satterthwaite 
Confidence level used: 0.95 
P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 4 estimates 
significance level used: alpha = 0.05 
NOTE: If two or more means share the same grouping symbol,
      then we cannot show them to be different.
      But we also did not show them to be the same. 
YLD = emmeans::contrast(YLD_emm, method = "trt.vs.ctrl")
YLD
 contrast       estimate  SE  df t.ratio p.value
 Cevya - _CHECK    319.7 113 306   2.829  0.0141
 Prot - _CHECK     -10.6 113 306  -0.093  0.9967
 Tilt - _CHECK      94.1 103 306   0.913  0.6684

Degrees-of-freedom method: satterthwaite 
P value adjustment: dunnettx method for 3 tests
